title: Whip (disambiguation)
content:
'''Whip''' referred to a weapon that consisted of a handle with a long tendril that could be swung at opponents. Weapons that corresponded to this model included:
*[[Whip (weapon)|Whip]], the prototypical model
**[[Bilari electro-chain whip]]
**[[Confessor's whip]]
**[[Electro-whip]]
**[[Fibercord whip/Legends|Fibercord whip]]
***[[Whipcord launcher/Legends|Whipcord launcher]]
**[[Fire whip]]
**[[Power lash|Force whip]]
**[[Iajik whip]]
**[[Lightwhip/Legends|Lightwhip]]
***[[Lumiya's lightwhip]]
**[[Mono-cord whip]]
**[[Neuronic whip/Legends|Neuronic whip]]
**[[Rodian cryogen whip]]
**[[Sancretti Arms Whip]]
**[[Shock whip]]
**[[Vibrowhip/Legends|Vibrowhip]]

It was also used in the names of several different things:
*'''[[Sunwhip Flightknife]]''', a unit of [[Blade-32 superiority fighter]] on [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]
*'''[[The Whip/Legends|The Whip]]''', a location on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*'''[[Whip (Human)|Whip]]''', a young man from [[Aurilia]]
*'''''[[Whip Hand]]''''', a [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|Lancer-class frigate]]
*'''[[Whiplash]]''', a resistance movement on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]
*'''''[[Whipsaw]]''''', a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Fyefee Tiis]]
*'''[[Whip-smelt]]''', a type of [[Fish/Legends|fish]] native to [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]]
*'''[[Finger-spear|Whip-stings]]''', a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] bioweapon

}}
